title: Netheright
description: Datapack for restoring Netherite Smithing without Templates and recycling Diamond Equipment from Netherite!
body:
# Choco's Netheright!

Returned from a succesful mining session for Netherite, only to discover you now need a pointless structure-locked Template to upgrade your Diamond Equipment? Or wanted to invest in another Tool/Armour, but lacked sufficient Netherite Ingots?

Worry no more! This datapack reverts Netherite Smithing to pre-Upgrade Template process, while adding a new method of recycling Netherite via Blast Furnace! (Diamond Equipment is left behind, still retaining enchantments and armour trims!) 

### Planned Features
- Netherite Horse Armour compatible with Trimworks (via datapack/resoourcepack)

### Credits
- Thank you [gluet2](https://modrinth.com/user/gluet2) for explaining [Armour Stripping](https://modrinth.com/datapack/armour-stripping) and letting me incorporate it! Visit gluet's profile for awesome quality-of-life datapacks!

### Other Resources
Visit [Choco's Netheright](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/netheright/) in PlanetMinecraft for reporting issues or discussions/recommendation/suggestions for the pack. Refer gallery and changelogs for the complete list of features changed/added.

### NOTE
Feel free to tailor this datapack for your personal preference, as long as you credit me and respective collaborator accordingly! However, you may not redistribute any of the assets, either commercially or otherwise, without obtaining prior permission first.
